user.title: GoodVibes Daemon
user.description: Connect to a GoodVibes daemon with the Home Assistant surface enabled. The Home Assistant long-lived access token is configured in the daemon as surfaces.homeassistant.accessToken; this integration stores the daemon URL, daemon bearer token, webhook secret, event type, and Home Graph settings in Home Assistant. Token and secret fields are masked in the setup UI. Assist conversation turns use the remote-chat /api/homeassistant/conversation endpoint.

data.daemon_token: Daemon bearer token or pairing token
data.include_unexposed_entities: Include entities not exposed to assistants in the Home Graph

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the GoodVibes daemon.
error.invalid_auth: The daemon rejected the bearer token.
error.surface_missing: The daemon Home Assistant surface is not available. Enable featureFlags.homeassistant-surface and surfaces.homeassistant.enabled.

abort.already_configured: This GoodVibes daemon is already configured.

init.title: GoodVibes conversation
init.description: These settings shape the Assist conversation turn before it reaches the daemon. The custom prompt and the selected Home Assistant LLM API are assembled by Home Assistant's conversation helper and sent to the daemon as the turn's instructions. The model call and Home Assistant control stay on the daemon.

home_graph_unavailable.title: GoodVibes Home Graph is unavailable
home_graph_unavailable.description: The GoodVibes daemon Home Graph endpoint is unavailable: {error}

home_graph_issues.title: GoodVibes Home Graph has unresolved issues
home_graph_issues.description: GoodVibes reported {count} unresolved Home Graph issue(s). Check the Home Graph issues sensor or call goodvibes.home_graph_issues for details.

daemon_version_unsupported.title: GoodVibes daemon is too old for this integration
daemon_version_unsupported.description: This GoodVibes integration speaks a daemon contract that needs daemon version {minimum} or newer, but the connected daemon reports {advertised}. Update the GoodVibes daemon (@pellux/goodvibes-sdk) so its Home Assistant surface matches this integration.

daemon_capabilities_missing.title: GoodVibes daemon is missing required surface capabilities
daemon_capabilities_missing.description: The connected GoodVibes daemon does not advertise Home Assistant surface capabilities this integration relies on: {capabilities}. Update the GoodVibes daemon (@pellux/goodvibes-sdk) so its Home Assistant surface matches this integration.
